mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, category, title, content, image_url, travel_plan_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, NULLIF(#{imageUrl}, ''), NULLIF(#{travelPlanId}, ''))
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.name as userName, COALESCE(l.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(c.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM post_likes GROUP BY post_id ) l ON l.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM post_comments GROUP BY post_id ) c ON c.post_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.*, u.name as userName, COALESCE(l.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(c.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM post_likes GROUP BY post_id ) l ON l.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM post_comments GROUP BY post_id ) c ON c.post_id = p.id
p.category = #{category}
AND ( p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY p.views DESC, p.created_at DESC
ORDER BY COALESCE(l.like_count, 0) DESC, p.created_at DESC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, image_url = NULLIF(#{imageUrl}, ''), travel_plan_id = NULLIF(#{travelPlanId}, ''), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id AS postId, c.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM post_comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_comments (post_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content})
